description: Tax receipt from the archive of Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb. Multiple registration marks such as 'al-ḥamdu lil-lāh ʿalā niʿamih', praise be to God for his benefactions, and 'al-ḥamdu lil-lāh shukran', praise be to God and gratitude.
tags: DIMME, tax receipt, Abu l-Hasan b. Wahb
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
